name: headless-oracle
description: Real-time market status (OPEN/CLOSED/HALTED/UNKNOWN) for 7 global stock exchanges with Ed25519 signed receipts. Designed for AI agents and automated trading systems. Fail-closed: any error defaults to CLOSED.

tools.name: get_market_status
tools.description: Check if a stock exchange is currently OPEN, CLOSED, HALTED, or UNKNOWN. Returns a cryptographically signed Ed25519 receipt. Input: MIC code (XNYS, XNAS, XLON, XJPX, XPAR, XHKG, XSES). ALWAYS check before executing any trade.

tools.name: get_market_schedule
tools.description: Get the next open and close times for a specific exchange, including holidays and early close days. Input: MIC code.

tools.name: list_exchanges
tools.description: List all 7 supported exchanges with names, MIC codes, timezones, and current status.
